name: Folder Organizer
description: Browse and organize a user-selected folder tree through a local MCP tool.

targetFolder.title: Root folder
targetFolder.description: Folder Organizer can browse and organize files inside this folder and its subfolders.

organizationDepth.title: Traversal depth
organizationDepth.description: How many folder levels Folder Organizer may scan when building a global organization plan for the tree.

semanticCategorization.title: Semantic categorization
semanticCategorization.description: When enabled, the agent may propose custom destination folder names instead of relying only on the built-in extension categories.

filesystem.purpose: Organize files in a folder selected by the user.

capabilities.description: Browse and organize files in a user-selected folder tree without deleting anything.

semantic_grouping.item_kind: files (each given as a relative path)
semantic_grouping.context: Organize the folder the way the user describes — for example by event, project, subject, client, or topic. Each destination is a single folder name with no slashes.

workflow_intents: Create a reviewed organization plan for the configured target folder.
Tidy, clean up, sort, classify, or declutter the files in the configured folder or desktop.
Preview proposed file moves before execution.
Apply a previously reviewed Folder Organizer plan only after human approval.
workflow_examples: Dame un plan de organización utilizando la skill de folder organizer.
Necesito limpiar y organizar esa carpeta.
Clasifica los archivos de la carpeta.
Ayúdame a poner en orden mis archivos.
Use Folder Organizer to preview how the target folder should be organized.
Tidy up and sort the files in my folder.
Clean up and classify the files in the configured folder.
Organize the configured folder after I approve the plan.
